title: carex pumila subsp. littorea
intro: Carex pumila subsp. littorea, also known as dwarf sedge or shore sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, Carex pumila subsp. littorea has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Carex pumila subsp. littorea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties.
